---
title: "F5 vs F6 population-level trait correlation"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
source(here("R/helpers.R"))
set.seed(123)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
tplant_F5            <- load_tplant_F5()
tplant_F6_germinated <- prepare_f6_germinated()
```

## Per-population trait ratios

### F5

```{r}
ratio_per_pop_F5 <- tplant_F5 |>
  drop_na(leaf_shape, leaf_edge) |>
  group_by(pop, ecotype) |>
  summarise(
    n_l           = sum(leaf_shape == "L"),
    n_o           = sum(leaf_shape == "O"),
    log_ratio_l_o = log((n_l + 0.01) / (n_o + 0.01)),
    n_s           = sum(leaf_edge  == "S"),
    n_g           = sum(leaf_edge  == "G"),
    log_ratio_s_g = log((n_s + 0.01) / (n_g + 0.01)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

### F6

```{r}
ratio_per_pop_F6 <- tplant_F6_germinated |>
  drop_na(elongated, serrated) |>
  group_by(pop, ecotype) |>
  summarise(
    n_l           = sum(elongated == 1),
    n_o           = sum(elongated == 0),
    log_ratio_l_o = log((n_l + 0.01) / (n_o + 0.01)),
    n_s           = sum(serrated  == 1),
    n_g           = sum(serrated  == 0),
    log_ratio_s_g = log((n_s + 0.01) / (n_g + 0.01)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

### Joined (one row per population)

```{r}
pop_ratio_joined <- ratio_per_pop_F6 |>
  left_join(ratio_per_pop_F5, by = "pop", suffix = c("_F6", "_F5"))
```

## Leaf shape

```{r}
corr_elon <- glm(log_ratio_l_o_F5 ~ log_ratio_l_o_F6,
                 data = pop_ratio_joined, family = gaussian())
summary(corr_elon)
```

```{r}
ggplot(pop_ratio_joined, aes(x = log_ratio_l_o_F5, y = log_ratio_l_o_F6)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = ecotype_F6)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ecotype_colors) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Leaf edge

```{r}
corr_edge <- glm(log_ratio_s_g_F5 ~ log_ratio_s_g_F6,
                 data = pop_ratio_joined, family = gaussian())
summary(corr_edge)
```

```{r}
ggplot(pop_ratio_joined, aes(x = log_ratio_s_g_F5, y = log_ratio_s_g_F6)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = ecotype_F6)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ecotype_colors) +
  theme_minimal()
```
